title: Golden Globes Predictions and No Guts, No Glory
text: Awards Daily published predictions for the upcoming Golden Globes ceremony, featuring forecasts from three contributors: Sasha Stone, Scott Kernen, and Jeremy Jentzen. The article notes that the reformed Golden Globes voting body consists of approximately 300 international voters, making them 'unpredictable' compared to the previous iteration. Stone observes that 'we kind of knew their tastes. These newbie voters, however, remain unpredictable.' Best Director featured strong support for Jafar Panahi ('It Was Just an Accident') and Paul Thomas Anderson ('One Battle After Another'). Contributors offered bold 'No Guts, No Glory' wildcards, including potential surprises in directing categories.
